input.content: Use any additional tools made available later.

tools.name: lookup_policy
tools.description: Look up an internal policy by slug.

content.text:
I can look up an internal policy by slug using the lookup_policy tool. Please provide the policy slug you want to fetch. 

If you’re not sure of the slug, tell me the topic (e.g., data privacy, incident response, acceptable use) and I can suggest likely slugs or help you locate it. Also let me know if you’d like a brief summary or the full policy text once retrieved.
